---
pagetitle: "Xorq documentation"
description: "Official Xorq documentation. Build data pipelines as content-addressed Ibis expressions, with a git-native catalog for publishing and reusing them."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
classes: homepage
listing:
  - id: centerpiece-cards
    template: "style/gallery.ejs"
    contents:
      - "getting_started/get-started-with-xorq-init.qmd"
      - "tutorials/core_tutorials/build_a_semantic_catalog.qmd"
      - "tutorials/core_tutorials/working_with_the_catalog.qmd"
      - "tutorials/ml_tutorials/train_your_first_model.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4
    fields: [title, description]
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-content}
# Expression-based context engine with git-native versioning.

Build data pipelines as content-addressed Ibis expressions, with a git-native catalog for publishing and reusing them.

[BROWSE TUTORIALS ↓](#centerpieces){.hero-btn .hero-btn-primary}
[VIEW ON GITHUB](https://github.com/xorq-labs/xorq){.hero-btn .hero-btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.content-section}

## <i class="bi bi-signpost-split"></i> Two ways to start

**With an agent.** Install the xorq plugin in Claude Code and let it build catalogs for you:

```bash
$ pip install xorq

$ claude
> /plugin marketplace add xorq-labs/claude-plugins
> /plugin install xorq@xorq-plugins
> /exit
```

Restart Claude so the new slash commands register, then drive xorq from the chat:

```bash
$ claude
> /xorq:init
```

Four slash commands cover the lifecycle: `/xorq:init` ingests CSV or Parquet files into a catalog, `/xorq:composer` joins catalog entries into new aliased expressions, `/xorq:builder` constructs ML pipelines and semantic-layer entries, and `/xorq:catalog-explore` discovers what's already there. The agent does the building; you keep the catalog.

**Manually.** Install the library and start composing expressions in Python:

```bash
$ pip install xorq[examples]
$ xorq init -t penguins
```

## <i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Tutorials {#centerpieces}

Four end-to-end walkthroughs. Pick the one closest to what you're building.

:::{#centerpiece-cards}
:::

## <i class="bi bi-grid-3x3"></i> Explore the docs

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i>

[**Concepts**](concepts/understanding_xorq/why_deferred_execution.qmd)

Deep dives into deferred execution, caching, and architecture
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-terminal"></i>

[**CLI reference**](api_reference/cli/)

Every command you need to build, run, and serve pipelines
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-code-square"></i>

[**Python API**](reference/)

Full reference for Xorq's Python API
:::
:::
